heading: Separability
label: 1652 Separability
text: If any provision of this chapter, or the application thereof to any person or circumstances, is held invalid, the remainder of the chapter, and the application of such provision to other persons or circumstances, shall not be affected thereby.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , . That section was superseded by section 652 of act , comprising this section, and repealed by section 651(a)(1) of the 1930 act.act Sept. 21, 1922, ch. 356, title IV, § 64542 Stat. 990June 17, 1930
